github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: NEVER use secret/forbidden WoW API values (aura names, spell names, combat log names/GUIDs, durations from protected APIs). These throw Lua exceptions on ANY operation — no compares, no storage, no concatenation, no tostring. Use spell ID lookups you define yourself, Blizzard's built-in aura filter APIs, or existing project patterns in LibSAdCore/oUF.
